published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakHullJaravel2022REStud + BorusyakHull2023Econometrica: standard shock-level SSIV orthogonality and recentering consistency benchmarks

published_prior_art.cite: none verified; closest are BorusyakHullJaravel2022REStud, BorusyakHull2023Econometrica, BorusyakHullJaravel2025ECTJ, and BorusyakHullJaravel2025JEP, none state this spectral iff frontier

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakHull2025OptimalFormulaInstruments, https://doi.org/10.3386/w33594: characterizes asymptotically efficient formula instruments using recentering

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The efficiency clause omits BorusyakHull2025OptimalFormulaInstruments (NBER w33594, https://doi.org/10.3386/w33594), which is a closer comparator for asymptotically efficient formula instruments than the review alone.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Omega is defined as E[(G-m_D)(G-m_D)'|S,C] with unit marginal shock scale, so Omega=0 means zero shock variance, not uncorrelated shocks, and conflicts with nonzero first stage.

soundness_flags.label: Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: The classical uncorrelated-shock reduction claims Omega=0, but under the displayed definition uncorrelated normalized shocks give a diagonal covariance/correlation operator, not the zero operator.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Equality of beta_B, beta_R, beta_D, and beta_exp cannot be determined from Omega, Pi, and epsilon alone without a defined residual shock-loading or covariance term for U.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The scalar beta_R-beta_D is said to equal the projection of the vector epsilon onto A_epsilon; the statement needs a scalar functional of that projection.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine Omega as an excess/off-diagonal dependence operator, or change the benchmark to Omega=I/diagonal with an explicit zero-excess-correlation condition.
Add a primitive residual-loading object, such as shock-level covariances with U after controls, and state how Omega, Pi, and epsilon generate the three IV numerator distortions.
Replace the vector projection claim in Conjecture 2 with a scalar contrast or norm, and define the efficiency bound and tangent space used by beta_D.
Add BorusyakHull2025OptimalFormulaInstruments and BorusyakHullJaravel2025JEP to the related-work comparison, separating optimal-instrument efficiency from the proposed three-way equivalence frontier.

recommended_next_step: Redraft the primitives and sanity reductions before any Stage 0 attempt; the current Omega benchmark makes a load-bearing reduction false.
